title: pungent-pickled-spanish-asparagus-tarta-de-santiago
description: umami spanish asparagus tart with pickled aioli and crispy queso fresco
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the garlic, sherry vinegar, water, salt, black pepper, and saffron.
Toss the asparagus with the olive oil and then add to the bowl with the marinade.
In a separate bowl, mix together the queso fresco, egg yolk, and sodium alginate.
Spherify the queso fresco mixture using a syringe and spherification bath.
Place the spherified queso fresco on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of puff pastry using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a spoonful of pickled aioli in the center of each pastry circle.
Top the aioli with a few pieces of spherified queso fresco and a spear of asparagus.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg and fold the pastry in half to enclose the filling.
Bake the tarta de Santiago for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
